selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: n. 行动, 行为, 幕, 法案；vi. 行动, 表演, 假装, 见效, 表现, 担当
words.definition: n. a legal document codifying the result of deliberations of a committee or society or legislative body

words.translation: vi. 出现, 显得, 来到
words.definition: v. come into sight or view

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意
words.definition: n. the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 脚, 步调, 英尺, 底部, 末尾, 步兵；vt. 走在...上, 给...换底, 支付
words.definition: n. the part of the leg of a human being below the ankle joint

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的
words.definition: n. a meeting at which a number of athletic contests are held

words.translation: n. 片刻, 瞬间, 重要, 阶段, 力矩
words.definition: n. a particular point in time

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 办公室, 部, 公职, 职责
words.definition: n. place of business where professional or clerical duties are performed

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: a. 快的, 迅速的, 敏捷的, 灵敏的, 急速的；adv. 快
words.definition: n. any area of the body that is highly sensitive to pain (as the flesh underneath the skin or a fingernail or toenail)

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. a member of the Caucasoid race

words.translation: n. 圣诞节
words.definition: n. period extending from Dec. 24 to Jan. 6

words.translation: n. 鼻子, 突出部分, 嗅觉；vt. 嗅到, 探出, 用鼻子触
words.definition: n. the organ of smell and entrance to the respiratory tract; the prominent part of the face of man or other mammals

words.translation: n. 雪, 积雪, 下雪, 雪花形干扰；vi. 下雪, 似雪般落下
words.definition: n. precipitation falling from clouds in the form of ice crystals

words.translation: n. 区域, 地方
words.definition: n. a region marked off for administrative or other purposes

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 衣服
words.definition: n clothing in general

words.translation: a. 干的, 无酒的, 枯燥无味的, 干燥的；vt. 把...弄干
words.definition: n. a reformer who opposes the use of intoxicating beverages

words.translation: n. 手指, 指状物, (手套的)手指部分, 指针；v. 用手指拨弄, 伸出
words.definition: n. any of the terminal members of the hand (sometimes excepting the thumb)

words.translation: n. 嘴, 口, 口腔, 口状物；vi. 装腔作势说话, 做鬼脸
words.definition: n. the opening through which food is taken in and vocalizations emerge

words.translation: pron. 我自己, 我亲自, 我独自
words.definition: pron. I or me in person; -- used for emphasis, my own self or

words.translation: n. 尼古拉斯（男子名）
words.definition: n. a bishop in Asia Minor who is associated with Santa Claus (4th century)

words.translation: a. 迅速的, 飞快的, 急促的, 陡的；n. 急流
words.definition: n. a part of a river where the current is very fast

words.translation: n. 景观, 视力, 眼界, 阅读, 见解, 意见；vt. 看见, 瞄准
words.definition: n. an instance of visual perception

words.translation: n. 烟, 雾气, 烟熏剂, 抽烟, 烟色；vi. 吸烟, 冒烟, 弥漫
words.definition: n. a cloud of fine particles suspended in a gas

words.translation: n. 南方人, 男风；a. 向南方的, 来自南方的
words.definition: a. in or characteristic of a region of the United States south of (approximately) the Mason-Dixon line

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: n. 事件, 物质, 原因, 素材, 实体, 重要；vi. 有关系
words.definition: n. a vaguely specified concern

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶
words.definition: n. a round vessel that is open at the top; used chiefly for holding food or liquids;

words.translation: n. 盖子, 帽子；vt. 戴帽子, 覆盖, 胜过
words.definition: n. a tight-fitting headdress

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: n. 天空, 天色, 天堂；vt. 击向空中, 挂在高处
words.definition: n. the atmosphere and outer space as viewed from the earth

words.translation: n. 糖, 糖块, 甜言蜜语；vt. 加糖于, 使甜蜜, 粉饰, 美化
words.definition: n. a white crystalline carbohydrate used as a sweetener and preservative

words.translation: a. 很少的, 微小的
words.definition: s very small

words.translation: a. 宽广的, 辽阔的, 广大的, 显著的；adv. 宽阔地
words.definition: n. slang term for a woman

words.translation: num. 八, 八个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of seven and one

words.translation: n. 包裹, 一伙, 一副, 背包, 包装；vt. 包装, 捆扎, 塞满, 压紧, 挑选
words.definition: n. a complete collection of similar things

words.translation: n. 直线, 直；a. 直的, 笔直的, 正直的, 直接的, 连续的, 整齐的

words.translation: n. 荒野, 荒地；a. 野性的, 野蛮的, 野生的, 失控的, 任性的, 杂乱的, 轻率的, 狂热的, 疯狂的
words.definition: n. a wild primitive state untouched by civilization

words.translation: a. 活泼的, 鲜明的, 生动的
words.definition: a. full of life and energy

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: n. 小声说的话, 旁白；adv. 在一边, 离开, 另外

words.translation: n. 跃, 回跳, 范围, 边界；a. 受约束的, 装有封面的, 有义务的, 关联的, 被束缚的, 准备去...的, 便秘的

words.translation: n. 胸部, 乳房, 胸怀；vt. 以胸对着, 面对

words.translation: n. 闪光, 闪现, 一瞬间；vi. 闪光, 闪现, 反射

words.translation: n. 乘骑用马, 框, 衬纸, 山；vi. 乘马, 爬上, 增长

words.translation: n. 开始, 口子, 穴, 揭幕；a. 开始的

words.translation: n. 管, 导管, 输送管, 管状器官, 声带, 尖细的声音, 烟斗, 笛, 管乐器；vt. 以管输送, 吹哨子, 吹奏, 尖声唱

words.translation: n. 屋顶, 室顶；vt. 给...盖屋顶, 遮蔽

words.translation: n. 恶意, 怨恨, 使人烦恼的事物；vt. 故意刁难, 欺侮

words.translation: a. 紧的, 密封的, 吝啬的, 严厉的；adv. 紧紧地
words.definition: a. closely constrained or constricted or constricting

words.translation: n. 一扭, 扭曲, 曲折, 歪曲, 螺旋状, 新手法；vt. 拧, 扭, 捻, 编织, 使扭转, 缠绕, 盘绕, 歪曲, 使转动, 使苦恼, 使混乱, 使旋转
words.definition: n. a jerky pulling movement

words.translation: a. 联合的, 团结的, 一致的, 和睦的
words.definition: a. characterized by unity; being or joined into a single entity

words.translation: n. 下巴, 颏

words.translation: n. 人, 动物, 创造物, 生物
words.definition: n. a human being; `wight' is an archaic term

words.translation: n. 舞蹈演员, 跳舞者

words.translation: n. 点头, 打盹, 晃动；vi. 点头, 打盹

words.definition: n. a protruding abdomen

words.translation: n. 鹿

words.translation: n. 草地, 草坪, 上等细麻布；[机] 细筛
words.definition: n. a field of cultivated and mowed grass

words.translation: n. 刻痕, 缺口, 划痕；vt. 刻痕于, 弄缺, 擦伤
words.definition: n. (British slang) a prison

words.definition: n. something immaterial that stands in the way and must be circumvented or surmounted

words.translation: n. 詹姆斯（姓氏, 男子名）；[圣]《雅各书》
words.definition: n. a Stuart king of Scotland who married a daughter of Henry VII; when England and France went to war in 1513 he invaded England and died in defeat at Flodden (

words.translation: n. 约克郡；约克王朝
words.definition: n. the English royal house (a branch of the Plantagenet line) that reigned from 1461 to 1485; its emblem was a white rose

words.translation: n. 弓, 眼睛框；v. 用弓拉琴, 弯成弓形
words.definition: n. a knot with two loops and loose ends; used to tie shoelaces

words.translation: a. 拔出的；draw的过去分词
words.definition: s. having the curtains or draperies closed or pulled shut

words.translation: a. 相符的, 根据...而定的；adv. 相应地
words.definition: s. (followed by `to') in agreement with or accordant with

words.translation: a. 中间的, 中央的, 中部的；prep. 在...之中
words.definition: s. used in combination to denote the middle

words.translation: n. 摩尔（男子名）
words.definition: n. United States composer of works noted for their use of the American vernacular (1893-1969)

words.translation: n. 美国
words.definition: n the territory occupied by one of the constituent administrative districts of a nation
